author: axxs
description: List upcoming local events for a place. Aggregates Eventbrite city directories, public iCal feeds, and manually-added events. Bundled region packs ship with the cog; admins can add their own places per guild.
install_msg: Whatsonin loaded. Default region is `tasmania`. Try `[p]whatsonin hobart` or `[p]whatsoninregions` to see the bundled packs. Admins can add per-guild places with `[p]wsa add`.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild place configuration (display names, source URLs/slugs, aliases, and any manually-entered events) added by server admins. It does not store data about individual end users.
